title: Cooperation by other state entities
doc_html:
§1026.  Cooperation by other state entities

All departments, commissions, boards, agencies, officers, and institutions of the state and all subdivisions thereof shall cooperate with the commission in carrying out the powers and purposes of this Chapter.  

Acts 1988, No. 4, §1.
